name: Shrimp Newburg
recipeInstructions:
1. Make white sauce by melting butter, add flour and cook until it bubbles.
2. Add onions and simmer for a minute.
3. Gradually add hot milk and cook until the sauce thickens.
4. Stir in peeled raw shrimp, pimentos, and liquid from one can of pimento.
5. Add 2 tablespoons Lea & Perrins sauce, dissolved beef bouillon cubes in hot water, dry mustard, chopped onion tops, and a dash of Tabasco sauce.
6. Remove from heat.
7. Carefully add beaten egg and cream. Mushrooms are optional.
